text:
I'll search for this Llama 3.2 Community License Agreement to verify whether it exists at the cited location.
Based on my search results, I found that the "Llama 3.2 Community License Agreement" is a real, official document published by Meta Platforms, Inc. The official version is hosted at https://www.llama.com/llama3_2/license/ with the exact title "Llama 3.2 Community License Agreement." The document is authored by Meta Platforms, Inc. (specifically Meta Platforms, Inc. and Meta Platforms Ireland Limited depending on geographic location), which matches the cited author.

The cited URL (https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.2-1B/blob/main/LICENSE.txt) appears to be a mirror or distribution point on Hugging Face, not the primary source, which explains why the automated checker reported it differently. However, the document itself—the Llama 3.2 Community License Agreement by Meta—is verifiably real and matches the title and author citation.

This is a valid non-academic source (license agreement / legal document), and the cited reference corresponds to a real, identifiable official document.

EXPLANATION: The Llama 3.2 Community License Agreement by Meta Platforms, Inc. is a real, official license document published by Meta; the cited URL is a distribution point on Hugging Face rather than the primary source.
LINK: https://www.llama.com/llama3_2/license/
FOUND_TITLE: Llama 3.2 Community License Agreement
FOUND_AUTHORS: Meta Platforms, Inc.
FOUND_YEAR: 2024
